We’re building a new financial layer for tokenized real-world assets on Solana.

ASSETS gives users exposure to real-world markets directly onchain:
• Gold (xAU)
• Silver (xAG)
• Equities
•

A lot of people have been asking what makes ASSETS different.

Here’s the vision:

→ Multiple real-world asset markets in one place
→ Equities, metals, commodities, real estate & more
→ Clean dashboard experience for managing positions
→ Portfolio tracking & allocation system

NEW EQUITY MARKETS ADDED

Now live on ASSETS RWA:
• Dell Technologies xStock (DELLx)
• Super Micro xStock (SMCIx)
• Uber xStock (UBERx)
Expanding access to tokenized equity markets on Solana with:
→ wallet-native access
→ real-time tracking
→ onchain settlement
More markets

NEW MARKET UPDATE

Two new tokenized markets are now live on ASSETS RWA:

• HOME — Real Estate
• BMNRx — BitMine xStock
Available with:
→ live pricing
→ Solana settlement
→ wallet-native access
→ real-time market tracking

Continuing to expand the onchain RWA ecosystem.

UTILITY UPDATE

Holders with 1M+ ASSETS tokens will receive zero platform fees inside the ecosystem.

Long-term utility and alignment for committed holders.
